scripts.wip: git submodule foreach "git add . && git commit -m 'chore: wip' || echo 'Commit failed in $name, continuing...'"
scripts.pull: git submodule foreach 'git pull origin main'
scripts.push: git submodule foreach 'git push origin main'
scripts.status: git submodule foreach 'git status -s || git status'
scripts.clear: git submodule foreach 'git branch | grep -v -E "main" | xargs git branch -D'
scripts.main: npm run branch && git submodule foreach git checkout main
scripts.sync: npm run pull && git add . && git commit -m "chore: sync each module" && git push
scripts.add-example: npm run add-submodule --repo=$npm_config_repo --path=examples/$npm_config_year && npm run ignore-all --repo=$npm_config_repo --path=examples && npm run init
scripts.add-package: npm run add-submodule --repo=$npm_config_repo --path=packages && npm run ignore-all --repo=$npm_config_repo --path=packages && npm run init
